assertions.reason: The exhaustiveness test executable passed positive exhaustive-match coverage, showing valid enum matches are accepted through the real CLI/compiler test surface.
evidence: nix develop -c dune exec ./test/test_exhaust.exe -> passed 26 tests total
test/test_exhaust.ml includes exhaustive-match positive coverage exercised by the passing executable

assertions.reason: The exhaustiveness test executable passed non-exhaustive negative coverage and the whole-expression regression coverage, showing missing enum cases are rejected even when enum type information must flow from the whole expression context.
evidence: nix develop -c dune exec ./test/test_exhaust.exe -> passed 26 tests total, including non-exhaustive negatives and whole-expression regressions
nix develop -c dune runtest --no-buffer test -> passed
test/test_exhaust.ml contains the non-exhaustive and whole-expression regression scenarios covered by the passing test run
